name: useResizeObserver
description: Hook that gives you resize observer state
examples: const { ref, entry, observer } = useResizeObserver((entry) => console.log(entry));

source.source: * @param {HookTarget} target The target element to observe

parameters.name: options.enabled
parameters.description: The enabled state of the resize observer

source.source: * @param {boolean} [options.enabled=true] The enabled state of the resize observer

tokens.name: [options.enabled=true]
tokens.description: The enabled state of the resize observer

parameters.name: options.onChange
parameters.description: The callback to execute when resize is detected

source.source: * @param {UseResizeObserverCallback} [options.onChange] The callback to execute when resize is detected

tokens.name: [options.onChange]
tokens.description: The callback to execute when resize is detected

returns.name: An
returns.description: object containing the resize observer state
